summary: The diff implements most PWA requirements including index.html meta tags, manifest.json, service worker, service worker registration, and ic-assets.json cache headers. However, REQ-3 specifies icons must be placed in frontend/public/icons/ and apple-touch-icon.png at frontend/public/apple-touch-icon.png, but the implementation places them in assets/generated/ with different filenames. The apple-touch-icon link in index.html also points to /assets/generated/apple-touch-icon.dim_180x180.png instead of /apple-touch-icon.png.

missing_requirements.requirement: Icon PNG files must be placed in frontend/public/icons/ for sizes 72x72 through 512x512, and apple-touch-icon.png at frontend/public/apple-touch-icon.png. index.html must include <link rel='apple-touch-icon' href='/apple-touch-icon.png'>.
missing_requirements.reason: Icons are referenced from /assets/generated/ paths rather than frontend/public/icons/. The apple-touch-icon link in index.html points to /assets/generated/apple-touch-icon.dim_180x180.png instead of /apple-touch-icon.png. No evidence of files being added to frontend/public/icons/ or frontend/public/apple-touch-icon.png.

hallucinated_features.description: Stale-while-revalidate strategy for ICP/API requests instead of network-first
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 specifies a network-first strategy for API calls, but the service worker implements a stale-while-revalidate approach for API/canister requests.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional cache entries for cryonex-icon-192 and cryonex-icon-512 variants in ic-assets.json and manifest.json
hallucinated_features.reason: These extra icon files were not requested in the build request image requirements or REQ-2/REQ-3.

hallucinated_features.description: On-draft service worker unregistration logic in index.html
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires skipping registration on draft; actively unregistering existing service workers was not requested.
